# Mount N Muscle
> Charlotte's hardest working hands. Junk removal, moving, hauling, TV mounting, flooring, and handyman services across the Charlotte metro area.

## Business
- Name: Mount N Muscle
- Phone: 704-237-0164
- Location: Charlotte, NC 28278 (Steele Creek area)
- Website: https://mountnmuscle.com
- Service area: Charlotte metro area, NC and SC

## Services
- Junk Removal: Starting at $90. Same-day response. https://mountnmuscle.com/junk-removal.html
- Moving: Local home and apartment moves. https://mountnmuscle.com/moving.html
- Hauling: Furniture, appliances, debris removal. https://mountnmuscle.com/hauling.html
- TV Mounting: Professional TV mounting, any wall type. Starting at $90. https://mountnmuscle.com/tv-mounting.html
- Flooring: LVP, hardwood, laminate, tile. Free in-home estimate. https://mountnmuscle.com/flooring.html
- Handyman: Assembly, repairs, installations. https://mountnmuscle.com/handyman.html

## About
Owner-operated business based in Steele Creek, Charlotte NC. Same-day response. On-site pricing. No pressure tactics. 10% discount for Google reviews. Starting at $90 for junk removal and TV mounting.
